response.justification: Bogdan brings strong domain expertise in geospatial data platforms through his work on GISCollective and Open Green Map, along with a proven track record of handling high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems. Although his most recent experience leans heavily toward TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang rather than the requested modern C++ or Rust, his past C++ foundation and exceptional focus on testing and software craftsmanship make him a strong candidate who could quickly adapt to the required stack.
strengths: Extensive domain expertise in building and operating geospatial data platforms (GISCollective, Green Map).
Proven experience designing high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems (handled millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby).
Deep commitment to software craftsmanship, automated testing (TDD), and rigorous quality assurance.
concerns: Recent technical stack is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, lacking recent production Rust experience.
Professional C++ experience is somewhat dated, with his last primary C++ role ending in 2015.
Experience is heavily focused on GIS mapping and data collection rather than specific routing or navigation algorithms.
